reason_for_decision: The article is already strong enough under the stricter rubric because it clearly separates TAS and TWS workloads, preserves neutral framing, and provides decision-oriented reading guidance.
strengths: It explains why TAS and TWS capacity figures are not directly comparable.
The article stays close to operational scheduling logic instead of drifting into jargon for its own sake.
The official reading list supports the technical distinctions well.
summary_assessment: This version passes. It is specific enough to be useful, technically credible, and sufficiently neutral for the current rubric.
